allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime" 2>&1)
Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name 'node' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, StartTime | Format-Table -AutoSize")
Bash(powershell -Command "Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'CCremote-Agent'" && sleep 3 && ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@123.57.34.57 "pm2 logs ccremote-server --lines 30 --nostream")

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force" && sleep 2 && powershell -Command "Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'CCremote-Agent'" && sleep 3 && ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@123.57.34.57 "pm2 logs ccremote-server --lines 15 --nostream")

Bash(powershell -Command "Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'CCremote-Agent'" && sleep 3 && ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@123.57.34.57 "timeout 20 pm2 logs ccremote-server --lines 0 --raw 2>&1" || true)

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Process -Name node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force" && sleep 2 && powershell -Command "Start-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'CCremote-Agent'" && sleep 4 && ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no root@123.57.34.57 "timeout 15 pm2 logs ccremote-server --lines 0 --raw 2>&1" || true)
